potential_missing.source_sentence: From there, they can look at market conditions, labour availability, weather insights, soil-related suggestions, pest control help, or log out.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall show market conditions when the user selects this option.
The system shall allow users to continue using the service after viewing any of these results.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: From there, they can look at market conditions, labour availability, weather insights, soil-related suggestions, pest control help, or log out.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow a user to view market conditions, labour availability, weather insights, soil-related suggestions, and pest control help.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall provide soil-related suggestions after receiving soil information from the user.
hallucinations.reason: The original text does not mention that the system provides soil-related suggestions; it only states that users can choose this option.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall offer weather insights based on the provided location.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous as it does not specify what kind of information or actions are involved in offering weather insights.

final_assessment_policy: moderate: needs_review if extraction/rewriting failed, no rewritten requirements were produced, exact duplicate rewritten requirements were detected, or the LLM validator reports 6 or more total issues across missing requirements, hallucinations, duplicates, and ambiguities
